---
title: "Improving Social Vote Recommendation in VAAs: The effects of political profile augmentation and classification method"
author: "Djouvas, C., Antoniou, A., and Tsapatsoulis, N."
date: 2018-01-01
description: "13th International Workshop on Semantic and Social Media Adaptation and Personalization (SMAP 2018)"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
